subcodes.first_line: I turn with utmost devotion to Thee, O Light of the earth and heavens, and implore Thee, O Creator of all beings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انی اتبتل الیک یا نور الارض و السموات و اتضرع الیک یا فاطر الوری تری تحلب
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed
